text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Well... I've been working really, really hard on
creating a new Japanese dessert for my friend's
birthday party...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I kept making and taste testing a bunch of
different desserts...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: A-and now I have a huge pimple on my forehead!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Urghhh... What are pimples if not the buds of
cherry blossoms...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Between her failed dessert creation and pimple
outbreak, it seems like nothing's going right for
poor Sakura Chiyono O.
